privileged_info_summary: The task environment and its data are entirely synthetic. The setup scripts manually initialize the CouchDB configuration document with a starting hospital name of 'City General Hospital' and email 'admin@citygeneral.org'. The verifier then confirms that the agent successfully updates these values to 'Grand Oak Community Hospital' and 'admin@grandoak.org', directly aligning with both the metadata and the task instructions.
